name: Iriso Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Iriso Electronics Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells connectors. The company offers board to board, FPC/FFC, socket, pin header, input/output, and card edge connectors, as well as compression terminals and ESD protector chips. It serves automotive, industrial, and consumer sectors. The company sells its products primarily in Japan, South Korea, China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, the Philippines, Germany, the United States, and India. Iriso Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
